# MetalForge — llms.txt
# https://llmstxt.org/
# Last updated: 2026-06-18
# Content: 63 drummers, 157 lick pages (100% coverage), 60 articles, 10 techniques, 19 bands, 57 comparisons

> MetalForge is the definitive database of professional metal drummers and their gear. 63 drummers, complete gear specs, 157 signature drum lick breakdowns, performance videos, and career histories.

## Core

- [Drummer Database](/llms/index.md): Complete AI-readable index of all content
- [All Drummers](/llms/drummers/): 63 per-drummer gear, bio, FAQ profiles
- [Gear Guide](/llms/gear-guide.md): Drum brands and equipment overview
- [Gear by Brand](/llms/gear-by-brand.md): Brand → drummer mapping
- [Endorsements Database](/llms/endorsements.md): Cross-brand endorsement index for 15 metal drummers
- [FAQ](/llms/faq.md): Frequently asked questions about metal drummer gear

## Signature Licks (100% coverage — 63 drummers)

- [Licks Overview](/llms/licks.md): All signature drum lick patterns
- [Per-Drummer Licks](/llms/licks/): 51+ per-drummer lick breakdowns (blast beats, double bass, iconic fills)

## Techniques

- [Techniques Overview](/llms/techniques.md): Metal drumming techniques explained
- [Per-Technique Guides](/llms/technique/): Blast beat, double bass, gravity blast, polyrhythms + 6 more

## Bands & Comparisons

- [Metal Bands](/llms/bands.md): 19 curated bands with drummer lineups and gear
- [Comparisons Overview](/llms/comparisons.md): Side-by-side drummer gear comparisons
- [Per-Comparison Pages](/llms/vs/): 57 individual drummer-vs-drummer comparisons

## Content Articles

- [Articles](/llms/articles/): 60 album drum setup breakdowns (Painkiller, Master of Puppets, etc.)

## Lists & Reference

- [Top-10 Lists](/llms/lists.md): Fastest drummers, best double bass, most innovative
- [Facts](/llms/facts.md): Metal drummer quick facts database
- [Quiz](/llms/quiz.md): Metal drum kit quiz content

## Tools

- [Tools Guide](/llms/tools/): MetalForge drummer tools description

## Optional

- [Gear Series](/llms/gear-series/): ~20 per-series gear breakdowns
- [Full Text Dump](/llms-full.txt): Complete content for single-request ingestion
